title: Collisions Lib
description: Collisions Lib is a small mod which gives all mobs a solid hitbox.
body: Join our Discord Server: For information, help, bug reports and anything else related to the project, join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/P4dUsxv6An)! About: Collisions Lib is a small mod which gives all mobs a solid hitbox, similar to boats and shulkers. There is a flag which can be disabled in order to turn mobs intangible again. Interested in hosting a server for any of my mods? Be sure to go with Bloom Host [here](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10). [](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10) Buying a server using this link supports me directly!
